positive: A symmetrical and stylized design featuring a majestic, intertwined forest silhouette against a vibrant, cosmic nebula backdrop. The foreground forest should be rendered in deep forest green and charcoal black, forming intricate, clean negative space outlines of trees and branches. The background nebula should burst with deep indigo, electric teal, and subtle gold accents, giving a sense of ethereal depth and mystery. Composition must be central, balanced, and highly scalable for clothing prints. Use bold lines, flat graphic elements, and a strong contrast between the organic silhouette and the vibrant cosmic wash. Minimalist yet dramatic.
negative: blur, artifacts, signature, logo, text, watermark, low resolution, ugly, badly drawn, extra limbs, mutated, bad anatomy, noisy, photographic, photorealistic, distracting details, gradients (too many), gradient mesh
